name: Uncover
description: Discover internet-exposed assets from external search sources.
long_description: Discover internet-exposed assets from external search sources.

fields.label: Search Query
fields.help: Enter search queries using Uncover syntax. Supported operators: org:, domain:, port:, asn:, etc. Example: 'org:secuscan.in' searches for assets belonging to that organization.

fields.label: Result Limit
fields.help: Maximum number of results to fetch(default: 100). Higher limits may increase query time and resource usage.
